risks.risk: AI character support specs could imply CRIPTO-TIP executes TTS, Live2D, VOXWEAVE, renderer, OBS, WebSocket, real DB, or production workflows
risks.mitigation: Docs and evidence explicitly state this PR is spec-only and does not execute external runtimes or claim readiness.

risks.risk: Support context could accidentally permit token price, investment return, custody, exchange, cash-out, ownership, or romantic escalation claims
risks.mitigation: Support Event Contract v2 and Character Continuity Contract define forbidden topics and hard reaction constraints.
